chains.q: What is the mathematical foundation of frequency stability characterization, and how do Allan variance, modified Allan variance, and phase noise PSD relate?
What limits the instability of optical frequency transfer over fiber links, and what is the path forward?
What determines the ultimate fractional frequency instability σ_y(τ≈1s) of FP cavity-stabilized lasers, and how can it be improved?
What are the scientific and metrological requirements for redefining the SI second from microwave (Cs) to optical frequency standards?
How do comb repetition rates evolve from MHz to GHz, and what enables f_rep as a precision timing reference?
What are the fundamental limits to optical atomic clock stability and systematic uncertainty, and how are they being overcome?
What limits the phase noise and timing jitter of optical frequency combs, and how close are we to the quantum limit?
What limits optical time-frequency transfer through free space, and how close are we to satellite-based global clock networks?
What determines the spectral bandwidth of frequency combs, and how has octave-spanning coverage been achieved?
What limits the phase noise of optical frequency comb teeth, and how can spectral purity be transferred from optical reference to microwave?
What determines the ultimate frequency stability of fiber delay-line (FDL) stabilized lasers, and how can it be improved?
How accurately can frequency combs measure absolute optical frequencies?

consensus.best: 5.5×10⁻¹⁹ (²⁷Al⁺ NIST) — optical clocks surpass Cs fountain by >1000×
